generated_oml:
instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor measuring position of gantry crane trolley and hoist"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor measuring velocity of gantry crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor, CraneVelocitySensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data continuously logged by Logging Application into TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for operational metrics storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GantryCraneAutomationMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for lab-scale gantry crane system with kinematic dynamics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureDataPipelineEnabler
]

instance AzureDataPipelineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for data pipeline implementation and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlForMotionPlanningService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance OptimalControlForMotionPlanningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for motion planning using kinematic model for precise movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionPlanningInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization through interactive interfaces for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeCraneStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure synchronization between physical and digital systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationStatusInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for operational metrics analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMetricsInsight
]

instance MotionPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal motion paths for gantry crane operations"
]

instance RealTimeCraneStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane position and velocity data"
]

instance SynchronizationStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of synchronization between physical crane and digital twin"
]

instance OperationalMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical metrics for system performance analysis"
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering methodologies for digital twin development"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDevelopmentService
]

instance GitHubVersionControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repositories for version control of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDevelopmentService
]

instance ContainerizationVirtualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization/virtualization technologies for deployment and dissemination"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance ModelDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for developing and maintaining digital twin models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for deploying digital twin across environments"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentStatusInsight
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation status of digital twin model accuracy"
]

instance DeploymentStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of digital twin deployment across environments"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application (Python) are transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to the crane controllers, utilizing trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service. Specific command formats, validation mechanisms, authentication, feedback systems, and execution confirmations are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization with context and container diagrams, utilizing virtualization technologies for deployment. Core components include InfluxDB for time-series data storage, ActiveMQ as a message broker for communication, and Microsoft Azure services for cloud processing. The implementation follows an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework, integrating physical sensors and digital components through standardized protocols."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Digital twin services communicate via an MQTT Broker for inter-service signaling, with TimescaleDB used for data storage. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Uses AutomationML for standardized data exchange in construction engineering contexts, integrates with Microsoft Azure cloud services for digital twin pipeline management, and employs ActiveMQ message broker for real-time communication between physical sensors and digital components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar implements an AutomationML-based digital twin for standardized data exchange in construction engineering, with Microsoft Azure cloud services used for pipeline implementation."
]
